• ENE
• Positive/close margins
• pT3/T4 primary
• pN2/N3 nodal disease
• Perineural/vascular/lymphatic invasion
• Subglottic extension for glottic cancer" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="979" y="2341" width="284" height="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S7sc-sbiqAC4uVxGUaUs-39" value="Radiation Therapy Principles" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="2250" y="1895" width="260" height="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S7sc-sbiqAC4uVxGUaUs-40" value="Definitive RT:
66-70 Gy 2.0-2.2 Gy/fx
IMRT, 3D-CRT, or Proton Therapy
Consider Altered Fractionation" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1941" y="2117" width="260" height="174" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S7sc-sbiqAC4uVxGUaUs-41" value="Postoperative RT:
60-66 Gy
Start ≤6 weeks post-surgery" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="2251" y="2153" width="259" height="102" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S7sc-sbiqAC4uVxGUaUs-42" value="Concurrent Systemic Therapy:
Cisplatin preferred Category 1
Alternatives: Carboplatin, Cetuximab" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="2559" y="2117" width="260" height="174" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S7sc-sbiqAC4uVxGUaUs-43" value="Follow-up & Surveillance" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1522" y="2449" width="238" height="54" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S7sc-sbiqAC4uVxGUaUs-44" value="Clinical Exam:
Every 1-3 months Year 1
Every 2-6 months Year 2

CT/MRI at 3-6 months post-treatment

Clinical Trial
Palliative Care" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1769" y="3328" width="260" height="126" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S7sc-sbiqAC4uVxGUaUs-53" value="Systemic Therapy Options:
• Pembrolizumab if PD-L1 CPS ≥1
• Cetuximab ± Chemotherapy
• Nivolumab
• Chemotherapy combinations" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="2079" y="3280" width="260" height="222" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S7sc-sbiqAC4uVxGUaUs-54" value="Special Considerations & Updates v2.2023" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1643" y="3588" width="260" height="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S7sc-sbiqAC4uVxGUaUs-55" value="• Larynx preservation emphasized
• Thyroidectomy for T4 or N2-3
• Avoid triple modality when possible
• HPV testing not routinely recommended
• pN1 without other risk features:
 Consider RT as option
• Minimize treatment modalities
 to reduce toxicity" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1643" y="3790" width="260" height="366" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S7sc-sbiqAC4uVxGUaUs-56" value="Very Advanced Disease Management
Clinical Trial
Palliative Care
Best Supportive Care" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="3817" y="1624" width="260" height="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell div.div:
Adverse Pathologic Features:
• ENE
• Positive/close margins
• pT3/T4 primary
• pN2/N3 nodal disease
• Perineural/vascular/lymphatic invasion
• Subglottic extension for glottic cancer

66-70 Gy 2.0-2.2 Gy/fx
IMRT, 3D-CRT, or Proton Therapy
Consider Altered Fractionation

• Pembrolizumab if PD-L1 CPS ≥1
• Cetuximab ± Chemotherapy
• Nivolumab
• Chemotherapy combinations

div.div:
• Larynx preservation emphasized
• Thyroidectomy for T4 or N2-3
• Avoid triple modality when possible
• HPV testing not routinely recommended
• pN1 without other risk features:
Consider RT as option
• Minimize treatment modalities
to reduce toxicity
